overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a white-haired warrior walking along a foggy forest trail. The character carries two swords on his back and navigates through dense pine trees, passing wooden debris and crossing a rustic bridge over a stream in a misty, atmospheric environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense foggy pine forest trail with natural rock formations

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the narrow dirt path through dense foggy forest, two swords visible on his back

entered.detail: Dense tall pine trees creating a wall of dark green foliage along the left side of the path
Dense tall pine trees creating a wall of dark green foliage along the right side of the path
Narrow winding dirt trail cutting through the forest undergrowth
Large moss-covered rock formation beside the path
Decayed wooden wagon wreckage with broken wheels sitting beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy forest trail enclosed by dense pine trees on both sides. The character walks steadily along the narrow dirt path, passing a mossy boulder on the left and approaching a broken wooden cart wreckage on the right. The atmosphere is misty and atmospheric with diffused morning light filtering through the canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with wooden fencing and stone wall boundaries

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the path as it curves slightly, passing the wooden cart wreckage

entered.detail: Rustic wooden post fence running parallel to the path on the right side
Low stone wall constructed from stacked rocks on the left side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The path opens slightly as the character moves past the wooden cart wreckage, revealing a rustic wooden fence on the right and a low stone wall on the left. The forest remains dense with tall pines, but the trail becomes more defined as it curves gently toward a distant structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bridge crossing over forest river

events.description: transitioning from dirt path onto wooden bridge structure over water

agents.ego_description: Geralt stepping onto the wooden bridge and crossing over the calm river water below

entered.detail: Rustic wooden plank bridge with thick rope railings spanning the river
Calm reflective water surface of the forest river visible beneath and beside the bridge
Thick twisted rope handrail supported by wooden posts along the bridge edge

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and steps onto a wooden bridge crossing a calm river. The dirt path gives way to wooden planks with rope railings on the right side. The river water reflects the foggy atmosphere below the bridge, while the stone wall and wooden fence fall away behind. The tall pine forest continues on the left as the character makes the river crossing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a misty forest trail that gradually transitions from a dense woodland path to a river crossing. It begins with the character walking through a narrow dirt corridor enclosed by towering pine trees, passing a mossy boulder and the wreckage of a broken wooden cart under diffused morning light. As the character moves past the debris, the trail opens slightly and becomes more defined, flanked by a rustic wooden fence and a low stone wall that curve toward a distant structure. The scene then shifts as the dirt path gives way to the wooden planks of a bridge, with the stone and fence falling away behind. Finally, the camera follows the character across the river, where the water reflects the foggy atmosphere while the dense pine forest continues to line the left side of the crossing.
